Terraform will perform the following actions:

  # nebius_vpc_v1_security_rule.allow_server will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "nebius_vpc_v1_security_rule" "allow_server" {
      ~ ingress = {
          ~ destination_ports = [
              - 8081,
              + 8082,
            ]
        }
    }

Plan: 0 to add, 1 to change, 0 to destroy.
